use tokio::task::{self, JoinHandle};
use tokio_util::sync::CancellationToken;

fn spawn_workers(data: Vec<WorkItem>, token: CancellationToken) -> Vec<JoinHandle<()>> {
    data.into_iter()
        .map(|item| {
            let token = token.clone();
            task::spawn(async move {
                tokio::select! {
                    _ = token.cancelled() => {}
                    _ = process(item) => {}
                }
            })
        })
        .collect()
}

fn spawn_cleanup(token: CancellationToken) -> JoinHandle<()> {
    task::spawn(async move {
        loop {
            tokio::select! {
                _ = token.cancelled() => break,
                _ = cleanup() => {}
            }
            tokio::time::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_secs(60)).await;
        }
    })
}

async fn process(_item: WorkItem) { todo!() }
async fn cleanup() { todo!() }
struct WorkItem;
